findings.description: The h2 section '日付ユーティリティ' contains 2 h3 sub-sections (クラス概要, 機能一覧) with well over 2000 chars of plain text. Per V3 guidance, when an h2 section has >= 2000 chars AND h3 sub-sections exist, the knowledge file should split into separate sections. The knowledge file merges both h3 sub-sections into a single s1 section.
findings.source_evidence: RST h3 headings: 'クラス概要' (=====) and '機能一覧' (======) under the '日付ユーティリティ' h2 section. Total content covers class declaration, a note block, and 8 fully-documented functions with code examples — far exceeding 2000 chars.
